title: Biden-Harris Administration Announces $62 Million to Support Americaâ€™s Growing Hydrogen Industry
content: In support of the Biden-Harris Administrationâ€™s Investing in America agenda, the U.S. Department of Energy (DOE) today announced nearly $62 million forÂ 20 projects across 15 statesÂ to accelerate the research, development, demonstration, and deployment of next-generation clean hydrogen technologies. author: tsawhney
